hub-shell-detector.evidence: Sales hub routes (SalesDashboard, PipelineBoard, RevenueAnalytics, ProposalBuilder, DealDetail) all have live data hooks, loading/empty/error states, and CTAs; no shells detected for SALES-POWER-01 changes.

live-demo-detector.evidence: Sales views using deals/pipelines respect isLive flags; DEMO pill appears only when data is not live; no unlabeled mock data found on SALES-POWER-01 surfaces.

cta-validator.evidence: Primary CTAs on SalesDashboard, PipelineBoard, RevenueAnalytics, and ProposalBuilder remain sales-intent (not commerce); no commerce-first CTAs introduced on Intelligence-driven Sales flows.

route-mapper.evidence: Sales routes from Intelligence (Signal → Create Deal/Proposal) land on Sales pages with working back/forward navigation; /sales/opportunities, /sales/analytics, and related views are reachable without dead ends.

accessibility-checker.evidence: Key Sales pages have headings, focusable CTAs, and accessible button/link labels; keyboard navigation works for primary CTAs and filters on pipeline/analytics screens.

error-state-enforcer.evidence: SalesDashboard, PipelineBoard, and RevenueAnalytics include error states with retry CTAs; SALES-POWER-01 changes did not remove or bypass these flows.

loading-skeleton-enforcer.evidence: Loading skeletons remain in place for pipeline and analytics components; SALES-POWER-01 does not introduce new loading paths without skeletons.

no_dead_ends.evidence: From Intelligence → Create Deal/Proposal → Sales views, users can always navigate back to Intelligence or onward to next sales actions; SalesDashboard provides clear navigation to Pipeline and RevenueAnalytics.

loading_empty_error_states.evidence: SalesDashboard, RevenueAnalytics, and PipelineBoard all have loading skeletons and explicit empty/error states; no new SALES-POWER-01 surfaces bypass these patterns.

cta_hierarchy_ok.evidence: On Sales-related pages, primary CTAs remain focused on sales workflows (create deal, view pipeline, export), with no commerce-first CTAs introduced on Intelligence-driven flows.

demo_live_labeling_ok.evidence: DEMO badges only appear when isLive is false; SALES-POWER-01 did not introduce unlabeled mock data or remove existing DEMO/LIVE indicators.

provenance_visible_or_linked.evidence: Signal-influenced deals are identified via signal_id; Sales views that originate from Intelligence preserve context via fromSignal/signal_id and allow users to trace back to the originating signal.

a11y_smoke_ok.evidence: Keyboard focus, headings, and button/link labels on SalesDashboard, PipelineBoard, and RevenueAnalytics meet basic accessibility expectations for this WO.
